'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=G_8bUtVdJc6cMwtrVa8mNeD4SGLVbf2xyHJJ.kMvqeI-1770735384-1.0.1.1-OO66NHsRONBZrOvhP4F3QZrVd5xD_f2DwuJHCkD0_3M"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
